articles.title: Polkadot-Based DeFi Network Surges by More Than 80% Amid the Launch of a New Notification Feature
articles.description: A decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol based on the interoperable blockchain Polkadot (DOT) is skyrocketing after launching a new notification feature. According to a recent article penned by the project’s chief growth officer, the scalable smart contract platform Acala Network (ACA) is enabling push notifications for users and developers of its DeFi platform. articles.title: Cardano: Assessing the state of ADA after its November plunge
articles.description: Cardano ended November with the highest development activity ADA started December with the highest staked ratio amongst all Layer 1 tokens Leading layer 1 blockchain Cardano [ADA] closed November with a development activity count of 572.67, putting it 18% ahead of the next highest-ranked asset, data from Santiment revealed. articles.title: $SOL: InvestAnswers Host Explains Why Solana ‘Has A Very Good Chance of Surviving’
articles.description: Recently, James Mullarney, the host of the very popular YouTube channel “InvestAnswers”, explained that although Solana ($SOL) got “a black eye” thanks to its exposure to FTX and Alameda Research, it is far from dead. articles.title: Cardano Is ‘Head and Shoulders’ Above Ethereum, Polkadot and Other Crypto Assets in One Metric: Santiment
articles.description: Smart contract platform Cardano (ADA) is unsurpassed compared to other digital assets when it comes to one key metric, according to market intelligence platform Santiment. articles.title: Cardano’s Hoskinson on Why Both $DOGE and $BNB Could Be Part of Elon’s Plans for Twitter
